$comment: Bundle size budgets for the desktop renderer. Sizes are gzipped bytes, measured at apps/desktop/out/renderer/. Budgets sit ~5-10% above the actual baseline so organic small changes do not red-flag the CI; they are intentionally NOT a hard ratchet. Tighten an entry only when a deliberate optimization landed and we want to lock in the win.

entries.name: main entry (index-*.js)
entries.$baseline: 122.95 KB after 2026-06-10 lazy loading of the built-in skill registry and embedded skill icons.

entries.name: markdown vendor
entries.$baseline: 100 KB on 2026-05-16. P6 removes this manual chunk; entry becomes optional after that.
